reasoning: Koren, your key physiological limiter is lactate clearance. The performance drop from 5-min to 20-min indicates a need for improved fatigue resistance and aerobic base. On this ride, we'll include structured over-unders to mimic the demands of the Alpine Loop and prepare you for sustained climbing.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Perform 4 sets of 8 minutes: 2 minutes at 212W (88% FTP) followed by 4 minutes at 246W (104% FTP), then 2 minutes at 218W (92% FTP). Rest for 2 minutes at 50% FTP between sets.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
